# Vendor Earnings

## Overview
Pendapatan dan disbursement untuk vendor.

## File Location
- `src/pages/vendor/Earnings.tsx` - Halaman earnings
- `src/components/vendor/VendorEscrowWidget.tsx` - Widget
- `src/components/vendor/DisbursementSettings.tsx` - Settings

## Database Tables
- `vendor_escrow_accounts` - Escrow vendor
- `disbursements` - Pencairan
- `orders` - Revenue source

## Features
- ✅ View earnings
- ✅ Available balance
- ✅ Pending balance
- ✅ Request disbursement
- ✅ Disbursement history
- ✅ Bank account setup

## Implementation Status
| Feature | Status |
|---------|--------|
| View | ✅ Complete |
| Balance | ✅ Complete |
| Disbursement | ✅ Complete |
| History | ✅ Complete |
| Bank Setup | ✅ Complete |

## Earning Sources
- Product sales
- Maintenance jobs

## Related Components
- `VendorEscrowWidget`
- `DisbursementSettings`
